roa.docketEntryComment: Peremptory Challenge to a Judge CCP 170.6
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 05/13/22 FTA HEARING 2ND BW
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWD/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 05-13-22/X:BAIL SET AT $5000/CTORD:DO NOT CITE/DOPC/

/CAL:DEJ STATUS/DAWT/DEF:IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE TERMS OF DEJ/CONTDPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/X:A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 12-10-21,/X: BAIL SET AT $5,000/DOPC/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 3, A MISEMEANOR CHARGE OF 487(C)PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:THIS IS A DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DAWF/TWS/ARBUCKLE/REMA/EMTERM/

/CAL:RELEASE TO ACM/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORTTO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/WS/RX/CTORD:REMAIN WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE FROM 800PM TO 600AM/CTORD:RESIDE AT HEALTHRIGHT 360/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARINGDATE OF 10-30-20 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:11-09-20 (30TH)/987,2/BAIL:20,000/SAORD/SA1:JESSICA TROY (32)/SAORD3/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DAWT/DEF 170,6JUD:VEDICA PURI/MO GRTD/X:CASEIS HEARD BY JUDGE GAIL DEKREON TODAY,/CONTD:RELEASE TO ACM/DOP/
